issues.description: No test file found for useApplyTemplate. This hook applies permission templates to users — an admin-critical mutation with no coverage.
issues.rule: Custom hooks for mutations on critical admin paths should have tests.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/users/application/hooks/useApplyTemplate.test.tsx covering success and error cases.

issues.description: No test file found for useTogglePermission. This hook grants/revokes user permissions — a security-relevant mutation with no coverage.
issues.rule: Custom hooks for mutations on critical admin paths should have tests.
issues.fix: Create apps/admin/src/features/users/application/hooks/useTogglePermission.test.tsx covering grant=true, grant=false, and error cases.

issues.description: No test file found for useUserPermissions. This hook fetches current permissions for a user, used in the admin permission management flow.
issues.rule: Custom hooks for data-fetching on critical admin paths should have tests.

issues.description: No test file found for useCartFromCookie. This is the central hook that reads the cart, groups items by seller, and resolves seller names — a critical path in checkout.
issues.rule: Custom hooks for critical checkout data-loading paths should have tests.
issues.fix: Create apps/payments/src/features/checkout/application/hooks/useCartFromCookie.test.tsx covering empty cart, single seller, multi-seller, hydration guard (EMPTY vs populated), and seller name resolution.

issues.description: No test file found for useAutoSavePaymentMethod. This hook implements debounced auto-save logic for seller payment method forms, including cleanup on unmount.
issues.rule: Hooks with non-trivial debouncing/timer/cleanup logic benefit from tests.
issues.fix: Create apps/payments/src/features/payment-methods/application/hooks/useAutoSavePaymentMethod.test.tsx using fake timers to verify debounce, save status transitions, and cleanup.

issues.description: No test file found for usePaymentMethodsManager. This orchestrator hook wires create/update/delete mutations and sort-order swaps for payment methods.
issues.rule: Orchestrator hooks with multiple mutations and UI state interactions benefit from tests.

issues.description: No test file found for useDelegateSearch. Other seller-admin hooks (useDelegates, useDelegateMutations, useDelegateCountsByProduct) all have tests; this hook is missing coverage.
issues.rule: Hooks in a feature with otherwise thorough test coverage should be consistent.

patterns.description: apps/payments/src/app/api/checkout/payment-methods/route.test.ts thoroughly covers the stock-integrity server route: valid cart, stock exceeded (payment methods suppressed), missing permissions (403), and invalid payload (400). This matches the checkout-stock-integrity rule.

patterns.pattern: Good E2E coverage of critical purchase flows
patterns.description: apps/auth/e2e/full-purchase-flow.spec.ts and apps/auth/e2e/checkout-stock-integrity.spec.ts provide end-to-end coverage of the multi-seller purchase flow and the tampered-cart/stock-guard scenario required by the checkout-stock-integrity rule.

patterns.pattern: tid() adoption is partial in cart/checkout components
patterns.description: Checkout components (SellerCheckoutCard, PaymentMethodSelector, ReceiptUpload, etc.) use tid(). Cart components CartDrawer and CartItemRow use tid(). However CartDrawerWithItems test targets CartDrawer directly (no separate source file exists), suggesting a test file was not cleaned up after a refactor.

patterns.pattern: Auth hooks (useSupabaseAuth) have no unit tests across apps
patterns.description: apps/store, apps/admin, apps/payments, apps/studio each have a useSupabaseAuth.ts hook with no corresponding test file. Auth session behavior is covered at E2E level (apps/auth/e2e/auth-session.spec.ts) but not at the unit level.
